stamp_rationale: Letter Status Tracker shipped progressively through multiple cron rounds with real fixes accepted (id-not-found guard, crypto.randomUUID, tap-targets, aria-labels, focus styles, contrast, empty-state). Last 3 TESTS-gate attempts produced only hallucinated BUGS objections with fabricated evidence (substr(2,9) strings and F.id/F.status references that don't exist in the code). Council enforcement rules catch LESSONS-VETO false positives but not BUGS hallucinations. Retroactive stamp rather than relitigate phantom evidence.
stamped_by: John (interactive session, 2026-04-24, after 6 real fixes + 3 consecutive BUGS hallucinations)

verdicts.reason: All correctness concerns from earlier rounds have been addressed: id-not-found guard in setDraftStatus, crypto.randomUUID for draft IDs, saveAddr consistency with other localStorage helpers. The 3 subsequent BUGS objections (rounds 7-9 on TESTS gate) cited fabricated evidence that does not exist in the code — verified via grep.
verdicts.evidence: index.html:2387 setDraftStatus with id-not-found guard and lastStatusError branching; index.html uniqueDraftId() calls crypto.randomUUID; index.html:3410 saveAddr returns false on all errors

verdicts.reason: No new attack surfaces. All user input escaped via esc()/escXml(). No network calls. CSP unchanged (architectural constraint, per CONSTRAINTS.md). localStorage usage follows existing patterns with user-facing warning on address book.

Tap targets bumped for mobile (min-height 28-30px, min-width 44px). Focus styles added (outline 2px accent + offset + inset shadow). Signed-badge contrast bumped to ~9:1. Empty-state messages differentiate 'no drafts yet' from 'no drafts match filter'. Keyboard accessible (aria-label on all new interactive elements).

ai-prompt-content block updated with Letter Status Tracker documentation (4 statuses, click-badge-to-advance, filter row, localStorage persistence) per the KEEP rule 'AI prompt updated on every feature tock'. Button titles and aria-labels self-document the interaction.

Document lifecycle tracking (Draft -> Signed -> Transmitted -> Replied) is core workflow value for users managing multiple formal documents — integrates naturally with the existing saved-drafts drawer. Filter row makes it scalable to many drafts. The cron council has affirmed this in 9/9 rounds.

Domain-specific workflow enhancement reinforces naval-scribe's identity as a reliable correspondence utility. No visual toys. Per feedback_utility_focus: internal workflow utility passes the utility bar without needing a portfolio-level signature move.

All documented naval-scribe lessons satisfied: aria-label at HTML layer (9 top-bar buttons + badges/filter), escXml uses split/join (no regex literals with embedded quotes), AI prompt updated for new feature, storage errors caught gracefully. Council enforcement rules correctly auto-downgraded 5 false-positive LESSONS vetos across the saga.
verdicts.evidence: learnings.md: KEEP aria-label, KEEP split/join, KEEP AI prompt updated
